justification: The question concerns the option-adjusted spread (OAS) of corporate debt securities, which is a key metric used to evaluate risk and pricing in the fixed-income market.
question: Will the option-adjusted spread of securities with an investment grade rating of AAA in the ICE BofA US Corporate Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt issued in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2026-04-12?
